label: MigDC
evidence: The term 'MigDC' in this atlas refers to 'migratory dendritic cell' as found in Extended Data Fig. 8 (adult/SkO data integration) and Supplementary Table 11, which lists cluster IDs and corresponding full names. 'MigDC' is used for clusters annotated as 'migratory dendritic cells' within skin immune populations.
